the-loop-academy/01-foundations-of-djing.filePath: The Loop Academy/01 Foundations of DJing/01 Foundations of Djing.md
the-loop-academy/01-foundations-of-djing.title: 01 - Foundations of DJing
the-loop-academy/01-foundations-of-djing.content:
Welcome to the very first month of The Loop Academy.
Before we dive into software, controllers, and mixing, we first want to build something more important:
A way of thinking about DJing.
Great DJs don’t simply play songs. They create experiences.
Throughout the lessons, you’ll hear perspectives from all three founders. Sometimes we’ll agree, sometimes we’ll offer different viewpoints. We believe those conversations are part of becoming a well-rounded DJ.
Topics

Introduction
What is a DJ?
The Purpose of Music
Why DJing Matters in Brazilian Zouk
What Makes a Dancefloor Feel Good?
The 5 Layers of DJ Development
Homework
Feedback

Enjoy Month 1, and welcome to the journey. ❤️

the-loop-academy/01-foundations-of-djing.filePath: The Loop Academy/01 Foundations of DJing/Feedback.md
the-loop-academy/01-foundations-of-djing.title: Part 8 - Feedback
the-loop-academy/01-foundations-of-djing.content:
We’d love to hear your thoughts as you work through the lessons!
Feel free to share your reflections, questions, or insights in our cohort channel. One of the greatest strengths of The Loop is learning from each other’s perspectives.

the-loop-academy/01-foundations-of-djing.filePath: The Loop Academy/01 Foundations of DJing/Homework.md
the-loop-academy/01-foundations-of-djing.title: Part 7 - Homework
the-loop-academy/01-foundations-of-djing.content:
Put the ideas from Month 1 into practice with your first assignment.

Next: Feedback

the-loop-academy/01-foundations-of-djing.title: Part 1 - Introduction

Meet the founders of The Loop and get a quick overview of what to expect from the Academy.

Next: What is a DJ?

the-loop-academy/01-foundations-of-djing.filePath: The Loop Academy/01 Foundations of DJing/The Purpose of Music.md
the-loop-academy/01-foundations-of-djing.title: Part 3 - The Purpose of Music
the-loop-academy/01-foundations-of-djing.content:
Explore how music shapes emotion, connection, memory, and movement on the dancefloor.

Next: What Makes a Dancefloor Feel Good?

the-loop-academy/01-foundations-of-djing.filePath: The Loop Academy/01 Foundations of DJing/What Makes a Dancefloor Feel Good?.md
the-loop-academy/01-foundations-of-djing.title: Part 5 - What Makes a Dancefloor Feel Good?
the-loop-academy/01-foundations-of-djing.content:
Understand the balance between trust, familiarity, exploration, and connection that creates unforgettable dancefloors.

Next: The 5 Layers of DJ Development

the-loop-academy/01-foundations-of-djing.filePath: The Loop Academy/01 Foundations of DJing/What is a DJ?.md
the-loop-academy/01-foundations-of-djing.title: Part 2 - What is a DJ?
the-loop-academy/01-foundations-of-djing.content:
Discover why a DJ’s role goes far beyond playing music, and why creating experiences is at the heart of everything we do.

Next: The Purpose of Music

the-loop-academy/01-foundations-of-djing.filePath: The Loop Academy/01 Foundations of DJing/Why DJing Matters in Brazilian Zouk.md
the-loop-academy/01-foundations-of-djing.title: Part 4 - Why DJing Matters in Brazilian Zouk
the-loop-academy/01-foundations-of-djing.content:
Learn why Brazilian Zouk offers DJs an unusually large amount of creative freedom and influence.

Next: What Makes a Dancefloor Feel Good?

the-loop-academy/index.title: The Loop Academy
the-loop-academy/index.content:
The Loop Academy is the 12 month Brazilian Zouk DJ course by the founders of The Loop.
Syllabus

Foundations of DJing
Music Discovery & Identity (coming soon)
Music Organization & Preparation (coming soon)
DJ Software and Hardware Basics (coming soon)
Mixing Fundamentals (coming soon)
Reading the Room (coming soon)
Performing at Events (coming soon)
Advanced Mixing (coming soon)
Creativity in DJing (coming soon)
Cohort Choice - TBD (coming soon)
Building Your Brand (coming soon)
Final Project (coming soon)

index.title: Welcome to The Loop Wiki
index.content:
Welcome to The Loop Wiki!
This is a set of companion resources to The Loop DJ community as well as course material for The Loop Academy, the 12 Month Brazilian Zouk DJ course by the founders of The Loop.
